report.summary: UX audit of 3 recent pages (cross-chain intents, DePIN ecosystem, gas fees guides), created OG image for cross-chain intents page, and implemented UX fixes including BackToTop component, mobile-friendly table scrolling, and touch-scroll optimization.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added BackToTop component to /learn/cross-chain-intents-guide — was missing while both other recent pages (DePIN, gas fees) had it
Added min-width (700px) to 5-column protocols comparison table for proper horizontal scroll on mobile instead of column compression
Added min-width (560px) to bridges-vs-intents comparison table for mobile scroll behavior
Added WebkitOverflowScrolling: touch to both tables for smooth iOS momentum scrolling

Identified cross-chain intents page uses 'use client' pattern without Next.js metadata export — consistent with other client-component learn pages (layer-3-chains, defi-insurance, dvt, world-chain) but noted as area for future improvement
DePIN ecosystem guide and gas fees guide confirmed structurally sound — proper server components with metadata exports, BackToTop, structured data, and OG images already in place

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: cross-chain-intents-guide (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with intent flow diagram (User → Fillers compete → Destination), category badges (Intents, Interoperability, Advanced), stats boxes (~2s median fill, $0.04 USDC fee, $9.96B+ deBridge volume), protocol names, brand gradient accent bar
Verified existing OG images: og-depin-ecosystem-guide-2026.svg (present), og-crypto-gas-fees-transaction-costs-guide-2026.svg (present) — no action needed

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/cross-chain-intents-guide — 3 fixes applied (BackToTop, table min-widths, touch scrolling), 1 recommendation logged (metadata export pattern)
/learn/depin-ecosystem-guide-2026 — No issues found (server component, metadata, BackToTop, OG image all present)
/learn/crypto-gas-fees-transaction-costs-guide-2026 — No issues found (server component, metadata, BackToTop, OG image all present)

sections.title: Recommendations for Future Sprints
items: Refactor client-component learn pages to server/client split pattern (server wrapper exports metadata, imports client component) for better SEO meta tag support
Add CSS :hover underline styles for internal links across learn articles — currently inline styles with textDecoration:none and no hover feedback
Consider adding scroll-margin-top to section anchors for sticky header offset when navigating via Table of Contents
